title: AI-Lab D-ND Bitcoin Regime Lab
intent: Monitor BTC regime hypotheses and falsify weak operational interpretations before they become signals, starting from Alipio's timeframe question and derived POC/Kumo/feed-robustness method candidates.
use_dynamics: turn trader language into observable event schemas, data-cards, baseline/nulls and falsifiers
answer the optimal-timeframe question through a validation matrix instead of opinion
test POC/Naked POC, inefficiency/FVG/LVN/CME gap, trendline retest and Kumo gates against matched nulls
classify outputs as observe, watch, test or reject before any decision-support or signal-candidate promotion
require feed robustness across Bitstamp, Binance, Coinbase and optional Kraken before accepting event labels
exclusions: manual chart annotations treated as evidence without mechanical definitions
Massimo Rea or Alipio methods treated as authority before observable/null/falsifier translation
current/open candle backtests unless explicitly declared as live-only observation
single-exchange wick or volume-profile result promoted without feed robustness
success_condition: A generated candidate passes generator preflight and strict M1-M8, exposes custom tools in context.md, and defines a first cycle that produces a data-card plus one timeframe/POC/Kumo/feed hypothesis classified as watch, test or reject with baseline/null evidence.
next_step: Run the meta-lab/template generator in isolated candidate mode; do not install live until the candidate passes strict validator and one supervised first-cycle plan.
operator_notes: Intent lives in movement, not in a prescribed BTC direction.
Primary initial intent is optimal_timeframe_discovery from Alipio.
Raw transcripts, private screenshots and copyrighted material must stay outside the public repo; only derived method cards enter the Lab.
The Lab may later produce signal candidates only after staged promotion: observe -> watch -> test -> reject/decision_support -> signal_candidate.
